feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content:
Currently, the criteria for determining the release of the requisition are as follows: document type, plant, requisitioner's name and amount. The release is applied per item.

The business requires that for a given requisition type, no release strategy is applied when the item has a contract assigned to it.

I have reviewed the CEBAN structure and used the VRTYP field in a new feature, which I added to the corresponding class; however, the expected result is not obtained.

I thank you in advance for your support and look forward to your comments on how to implement this business need.

Best regards Percy

entry.title: Is it possible to obtain native SQL query that is executed over the graphical Calculation View?
entry.content:
Hello! I'm trying to find out, if it is possible to get SQL query, that will be executed on the DB, when user gets data from the Calculation View?

I know how to obtain XML definition of the Calculation View, but I believe eventually data from the DB is retrieved by running SQL query to the database. Is there a way how to get this SQL query for the Calculation view? Ideally programmatically.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Documentation of the XML structure of the Calculation view
entry.content:
Hello, is there a reasonably documented XML definition of the Calculation Views for SAP HANA? Like what are possible nodes, attributes, inner references, etc.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST does not update ACDOCA when PO is added
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working with a custom Z development that performs mass posting of accounting documents from Excel files using the BAPI BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. Recently, an enhancement was added to include a Purchase Order (PO) in the vendor line item through a BAdI. The issue is that when posting documents that contain the PO number in that line, the document is created but not saved in table ACDOCA, nor is it visible in the Universal Journal. It is only recorded in the classic tables (such as BKPF/BSEG), which prevents it from being cleared later, as the system doesn’t recognize it as a valid document in the Universal Ledger. Interestingly, documents that do not include a PO are posted correctly and appear in ACDOCA without any issues. Has anyone experienced a similar case? Do you know of any SAP Note or configuration that should be checked to ensure that the BAPI posts correctly when a PO is included? The enhancement used to add the PO and item is Extension 2. Any help or experience is greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to correct non-reconcilable documents to insert them properly in ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on a Z development that performs mass upload of accounting documents using the BAPI BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. Recently, we discovered that documents containing a purchase order do not get saved in the necessary tables (such as ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA), which prevents them from being reconciled later. Documents without a purchase order are posted correctly and appear in both ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA, but those containing the PO are not inserted into these tables, causing a problem for reconciliation. Has anyone experienced this kind of situation? Are there any methods or SAP Notes to insert these documents into ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA tables to make them reconcilable? Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Golden Arrow not showing on Alert
entry.content:
Hi can you please help on my query - the golden arrow is not showing on Alert - I need the golden arrow on the doc number?

Thank you.

SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocDate" FROM OINV T0 WHERE
T0."DocDate" = CURRENT_DATE
and
T0."DocTotal" <= 0

entry.title: STO PO creation through BAPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

           I'm creating STO PO through BAPI_PO_CREATE1, while executing this I'm facing ME 083 Enter supplier error. I have maintained correct document type, suppling plant and other details whatever we maintain during manual creation of STO PO. Can you suggest any solution?

entry.title: Negative Balances in AR Aging Report Due to FBRA on Partial Clearings (SAP S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team, 

We’re facing an ongoing issue in our custom AR Aging report. After running FBRA (on 12.02.2025) to reverse incorrect partial clearings from 2022 for Customer 100009, the Aging report now shows negative balances in retro reports (2022 and 2023).

These DZ (clearing reversal) documents are technically correct per FI postings, but the CFO expects no negatives in the Aging Report. If we exclude these DZ docs, the report doesn’t match FS or FBL3N.

Goal: Build aging logic that matches Financial Statements and FBL3N, both retrospectively and prospectively, but avoids showing negative AR balances due to FBRA.

Any advice on handling FBRA and DZ documents in custom aging reports? Can we simulate prior status or apply dynamic logic for cleared history?

entry.title: Prerequisites for migrating BW 7.5 SPS10 from SQL Server to HANA.
entry.content:
Hello All,

As part of the heterogeneous migration process, we are required to export BW system.

Please provide the prerequisite checks that need to be carried out prior to the BW system migration to HANA.

Source details

SAP BW 7.5 SPS10
SQL DB: Microsoft SQL Server 2017
OS: Windows Server 2019

Note: in the Target
The operating system is changing from Windows to Linux.
BW database will be changed in the target system (from sql server to HANA DB).

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: Reforma tributária, RVABRA nota 3556404, off set?
entry.content:
Os bcset da nota 3556404 entregaram as condições CBS3, IB3S e IB3M amarradas as chaves de conta MWC, MWD, MWE.

Contudo, não foi criada sua respectiva off-set, para mapping na VKOA, gerando a perninha do recolher e do a pagar, sendo uma pela OB40 e outra pela VKOA.

Acreditam que a alguma razão fiscal, ou foi deixado para ser feito Z a gosto do cliente? 

Se estiver sendo ignorante me perdoem, pois me chamou a atenção ao fazer o paralelo entre MW2 e a BRI, por exemplo.

Abraços.

Eduardo

entry.title: Checklist Before HANA Upgrade (Brownfield)
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

I have a customer who will be transitioning from SAP ECC to SAP HANA. A brownfield migration is planned. In this context, what is the easiest way to identify the developments and enhancements made in the ECC system? What should I do to adjust these developments after the system is upgraded to HANA?

I've gathered some information through research, but I'm looking for comprehensive knowledge. I'm open to your valuable suggestions.

 

Kind regards,
Nedim YILMAZ

entry.title: Insert ROW-TYPE variable into table without explicitly typing all column names
entry.content:
Hello all,
As far as I understand triggers hold the record about to be inserted/updated as a row variable which I am able to use by referencing its parts. Example:

CREATE TRIGGER TEST_TRIGGER_VAR_UPDATE
AFTER UPDATE ON TARGET
REFERENCING NEW ROW mynewrow, OLD ROW myoldrow
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
INSERT INTO SAMPLE_new VALUES(:mynewrow.a, :mynewrow.b);
END;

This is unacceptable for me as I want to create triggers on 50+ tables and I cannot explicitly state all of the collections elements for all these tables.
I need sth like INSERT INTO SAMPLE_new VALUES(:mynewrow.*);
or
INSERT INTO SAMPLE_new SELECT * FROM (:mynewrow);

Thanks

entry.title: Send prompt from SAP GUI to AI Core service
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to create an application on my SAP backend in SAP GUI that can send my prompts from GUI to SAP BTP AI core service .Can anyone guide me how can I achieve this?

entry.title: Set Document Class
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm trying to set document type C1 in transaction F-28, but it doesn't appear. In the User Parameters tab (SU01), I added the BAR parameter, and whenever I access the F-28 TRX, it shows me document type DZ.

Is there another way to set the document type?

Thank you.

#FI

entry.title: Express document "Update was canceled" received from author in FB05
entry.content:
I received the error "Express document 'Update was canceled' received from author" while trying to clear a document in FB05.
When I checked SM13, I found the update termination (screenshot attached).
I also encountered the same issue when attempting to reverse the document in FB08.
I also checked the number range, but it didn’t help.

Has anyone faced this before? Any suggestions on how to resolve this?
Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Route change in sales order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

Yes in standard, changing the route of a sales order can impact the confirmation dates, because the delivery scheduling uses route-dependent lead times to calculate them.

SAP Standard :

When you change the route on a sales order item, SAP triggers a re-scheduling of the item.

This happens because the route determines transit time and transportation lead times, which directly affect the delivery and goods issue dates. When you change the route, SAP recalculates these dates using the new route’s parameters. As a result, confirmed schedule lines may change, especially if availability check (ATP) is also active.

Further below points can be considered for checking

ATP Check: If ATP is enabled, the system will run a new availability check after the route is changed. This can lead to a change in confirmation quantity and/or date.

Scheduling Configuration: In customizing (IMG > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Delivery Scheduling and Transportation Scheduling), the system is set to re-trigger scheduling when key fields like route are updated.

User Exit / BADI: In some cases, standard logic might be enhanced or restricted using custom logic so you can check in system if you're not seeing the standard results.

entry.title: FIORI Issue - Table /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH is not getting updated from backend
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

We are trying to find the last changed date of the OData Services for the Audit. Just to set up a context for the question - We are trying to find out if a specific "Report" in Fiori is a Standard / Customized Report. So, for example - if we have a "Aged Debtors Report" which is basically the FBL5N report, in Fiori, and if we are extracting the same from FIORI, and if we are to prove that the report has not been meddled with, we would have to check the OData Services. 

So, now what I am trying to understand is, for the tile as per this example - "Aged Debtors Report", we need to find out the OData Services (v4 and v2), and then through /UI2/FLPCM_CUST, we are finding out the OData services, and then we are viewing the services - find out the External Service Name. 

Now, once I find out the External Service Name, I will query the table /IWFND/I_MED_SRH and /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH to find out the Data Provider Class and the last changed dates of the class, and who has changed it. That will give me the idea if the "Tile" is a standard tile or a customized tile. 

I need an help in understanding if the above methodology is correct. 

I also need a help with the below screenshot from /IWBEP/I_MGW_SRH table, where the Changed By / Changed_timestmp field is empty, but in the backend transaction i.e. /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE is populated for this field. 

Could you help me understand / solve the above 2 Questions. Also, another context is, this is for an Audit that we are doing.

entry.title: Issue in activating Extended CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Team i am traying to extend the standard view NSDM_V_MARC.

My syntax is as below.

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'YCL_COBL'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension view for Append MM_APP_MSEG'
extend view NSDM_V_MARC with ZNSDM_V_MARC_EXT
{
zzdanger,
zztop_stock,
zzstabl,
zzplan,
zzrmatn,
zzdmatn,
zzimatn,
zzid_repa,
zzqs,
zznivq,
zzid_imma,
zzcd_gest,
zzdur_moy,
zzpomatnr
}

 

But while activating the same i am getting below error.

Internal exception raised (VIEW DEFINITION AND EXTEND DO NOT FIT TOGETHER )

Your help be really appreciated.

@ABAP @Hana @CDS

entry.title: How can I undeploy a specific field from a table in SAP HANA?
entry.content:
We are developing CAP Java application and in our entity definition(see below) we are using the @SAP/cds/common/#aspect-managed to auto-manage audit fields (createdBy, modifiedAt, modifiedBy, etc.).

Since managed aspect automatically add audit fields and these fields have already been deployed to SAP HANA, so they exist in the database BUT now we want to undeploy certain fields (e.g., createdBy, modifiedAt, modifiedBy) while keeping createdAt? 

What is the best way to undeploy specific fields from table? 

Entity definition: 

 

using { managed } from '@sap/cds/common';
entity CustomerContracts : managed {
key owner : Association to CustomersAssigned;
};
 
Current Approach:
 
using db/undeploy.json, can someone help if this is the right approach to undeploy from CustomerContracts table?
 
"src/gen/landscape.CustomerContracts.createdBy.<it should be column not table>",
"src/gen/landscape.CustomerContracts.modifiedAt.<it should be column not table >",
"src/gen/andscape.CustomerContracts.modifiedBy.<it should be column not table>"
 
with this approach, I expect that all above fields should be undeployed from DB CustomerContracts table and keep others. 
 
In service definition we make sure to expose createdAt e.g.,
 
entity CustomerContracts as projection on landscape.CustomerContracts {
  owner,
  createdAt
};
However, projection ensures that only targeting fields are exposed but will not delete other fields from db.
 
 
Expected output:
 
{
"owner_ID": "12345",
"createdAt": "2025-04-11T08:59:31.063725Z"
},

entry.title: How to chain HANA SQL input files in a HANA SQL Input file
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to simplify my configuration. I have written several sql scripts to create users, roles, policies, set parameters etc. Now I would like to chain these scripts in an input file for hdbsql. 

The best way on my opinion:

loggin on with <sid>adm 

hdbsql -d SYSTEMDB -u SYSTEM

\i configure_hana.script

Content of configure_hana.script:

\i create_roles.sql;

\i create_users.sql;

\i set_parameters.sql;

hdbsql executes the first script, but stucks after this. There are ; at the end of each line in the sql script. 

I do not want to store a user with admin authorisation in hdbuserstore and I do not want to execute hdbsql with password in command line. Because of this, I would like to logon first and then call the input file. 

I can`t find a syntax to terminate the input file. 

Can you give me a hint to the solution.

Best Regards

Andreas
